name: @threadwick/i18n
description: Threadwick's localization layer: an enriched English source of truth, a Claude translation pipeline (change-detection + human overrides), context-stripped per-locale bundles, a typed intl-messageformat runtime, and a CI lint that guards glossary, ICU plurals, placeholders, and length budgets.

scripts.i18n: tsx scripts/translate.ts && tsx scripts/codegen.ts && tsx scripts/lint.ts
